geographic_restrictions: Projects must be conducted in Latin America, the Caribbean, Mexico, Central America, South America, or the Caribbean.
project_area: shorebird conservation and research in the Neotropics
demographic_requirements: Early-career professionals with five or fewer years of experience; nationals or residents of Neotropical countries.
eligibility_summary: Open to early-career conservationists and researchers who are nationals or residents of Neotropical countries (Mexico, Central America, South America, Caribbean). Projects must focus on shorebird conservation or research in the region, demonstrate practical conservation outcomes, and include measurable results. Preference given to those with local collaboration and stakeholder engagement.
